description.content: Fine-grained access control policies for workloads

List all AuthorizationPolicy resources in the specified namespace. An AuthorizationPolicy enables access control on workloads in the mesh, supporting ALLOW, DENY, AUDIT, and CUSTOM actions based on source, operation, and condition matching.

query.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels
Maximum number of resources to return
Continue token for paginated list requests

response.name: Successful response containing list of AuthorizationPolicies

description.content: Create a new AuthorizationPolicy resource in the specified namespace.
Mutual TLS configuration for peer-to-peer communication

List all PeerAuthentication resources in the specified namespace. A PeerAuthentication defines how traffic will be tunneled (or not) to the sidecar proxy, configuring mutual TLS mode for inbound connections.

query.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels
Maximum number of resources to return
Continue token for paginated list requests

response.name: Successful response containing list of PeerAuthentications

description.content: Create a new PeerAuthentication resource in the specified namespace.

List all RequestAuthentication resources in the specified namespace. A RequestAuthentication defines the request authentication methods supported by a workload. It will reject requests with invalid authentication information based on configured JWT rules.

query.description: A selector to restrict the list of returned objects by their labels
Maximum number of resources to return
Continue token for paginated list requests

response.name: Successful response containing list of RequestAuthentications

description.content: Create a new RequestAuthentication resource in the specified namespace.

The Istio Security API (security.istio.io) provides configuration resources for managing security policies within an Istio service mesh. It includes AuthorizationPolicy for fine-grained access control on workloads, PeerAuthentication for configuring mutual TLS (mTLS) between service proxies, and RequestAuthentication for validating JWT tokens attached to incoming requests. These resources are defined as Kubernetes Custom Resource Definitions (CRDs) and are accessed via the Kubernetes API server.
